briefs.title: Council to vote on $1.3M traffic control contract with Metro Traffic Ltd.
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a contract worth up to $1,300,000 (including taxes) to Metro Traffic Ltd. for flagging and traffic control services starting February 1, 2026, with up to four yearly renewals possible.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision if your business operates near Burnaby road or construction sites.
